---
title: "data: Multivariable Associations with Over/Underdiagnosis"
author: "Till Julius Adam"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(glmnet)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
library(car)
library(broom)
library(rcompanion)
```

```{r config}
# === DISORDER MAPPING ===
# Keys: short names used in file names and output
# Values: SDM column suffix in the imputed data files
disorders <- list(
  ADHD       = "AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder",
  Psychosis  = "SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
  Bipolar    = "BipolarAndRelatedDisorder",
  Depression = "DepressiveDisorder",
  Anxiety    = "AnxietyDisorder",
  Trauma     = "TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder",
  Conduct    = "DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
  Substance  = "SubstanceAbuse"
)

directions <- c("over", "under")

# === CANDIDATE PREDICTORS ===
# These are the only variables eligible for LASSO selection.
# race will be expanded to dummies; all others used as-is.
candidate_predictors <- c(
  "Age", "sex", "race",
  "SES_Average", "Family_History_Any", "Smoking", "Nr_Diag_R",
  "YMRS_total_1m", "MADRS_total", "GAF_Current",
  "SeverityOfIllness", "ROAS_POW_total",
  # 18 BPRS items
  "SomaticConcern", "Anxiety", "Depression", "Guilt",
  "Hostility", "Suspiciousness", "UnusualThoughtContent",
  "Grandiosity", "HallucinatoryBehavior", "Disorientation",
  "Conceptualdisorganization", "Bluntedaffect", "Emotionalwithdrawal",
  "Motorretar", "Tension", "Uncooperativeness",
  "Excitement", "MannerismsPosturing"
)
```

```{r helper-functions}
# Prepare one completed dataset for modeling
prepare_df <- function(df, sdm_col, outcome_col, direction, candidate_predictors) {
  names(df) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(df))

  if (direction == "over") {
    df <- df %>%
      filter(.data[[sdm_col]] %in% c("FP", "TN")) %>%
      mutate(!!outcome_col := as.integer(.data[[sdm_col]] == "FP"))
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      filter(.data[[sdm_col]] %in% c("FN", "TP")) %>%
      mutate(!!outcome_col := as.integer(.data[[sdm_col]] == "FN"))
    if ("Nr_Diag_R" %in% names(df)) df$Nr_Diag_R <- df$Nr_Diag_R - 1
  }

  available_preds <- intersect(candidate_predictors, names(df))
  df_model <- df %>% select(all_of(c(outcome_col, available_preds)))

  if ("race" %in% names(df_model)) {
    df_model$race <- relevel(factor(df_model$race), ref = "White")
    race_mat <- model.matrix(~ race, data = df_model)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
    colnames(race_mat) <- gsub("^race", "race_", colnames(race_mat))
    df_model <- df_model %>% select(-race) %>% bind_cols(as.data.frame(race_mat))
  }

  factor_vars <- intersect(c("sex", "Family_History_Any", "Smoking"), names(df_model))
  df_model[factor_vars] <- lapply(df_model[factor_vars], as.factor)

  # Drop constant columns and columns constant within outcome groups
  drop_cols <- c()
  for (v in setdiff(names(df_model), outcome_col)) {
    vals_all <- df_model[[v]]
    vals_1   <- df_model[[v]][df_model[[outcome_col]] == 1]
    vals_0   <- df_model[[v]][df_model[[outcome_col]] == 0]
    if (length(unique(vals_all)) <= 1 ||
        length(unique(vals_1)) <= 1 ||
        length(unique(vals_0)) <= 1) {
      drop_cols <- c(drop_cols, v)
    }
  }
  if (length(drop_cols) > 0) df_model <- df_model %>% select(-all_of(drop_cols))

  df_model[complete.cases(df_model), ]
}

# Run LASSO on one dataset, return selected predictor names (original column names)
run_lasso <- function(df_model, outcome_col, seed = 123) {
  lasso_formula <- as.formula(paste(outcome_col, "~ ."))
  X <- model.matrix(lasso_formula, data = df_model)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  y <- df_model[[outcome_col]]

  set.seed(seed)
  cv_lasso <- tryCatch(
    cv.glmnet(X, y, family = "binomial", alpha = 1),
    error = function(e) { message("  LASSO failed: ", e$message); NULL }
  )
  if (is.null(cv_lasso)) return(character(0))

  lasso_coefs   <- coef(cv_lasso, s = "lambda.min")
  selected_vars <- setdiff(rownames(lasso_coefs)[which(lasso_coefs != 0)], "(Intercept)")
  if (length(selected_vars) == 0) return(character(0))

  # Map dummy names back to original predictor columns
  all_pred_cols <- setdiff(names(df_model), outcome_col)
  predictor_names <- unique(sapply(selected_vars, function(sv) {
    matches <- all_pred_cols[startsWith(sv, all_pred_cols)]
    if (length(matches) > 0) return(matches[which.max(nchar(matches))])
    matches2 <- all_pred_cols[sapply(all_pred_cols, function(p) grepl(paste0("^", p), sv))]
    if (length(matches2) > 0) return(matches2[which.max(nchar(matches2))])
    return(sv)
  }))
  intersect(unique(predictor_names), all_pred_cols)
}

# VIF check: iteratively remove variables with VIF > 10
vif_check <- function(formula, data) {
  repeat {
    fit <- glm(formula, data = data, family = binomial)
    preds <- attr(terms(fit), "term.labels")
    if (length(preds) <= 1) break
    v <- tryCatch(car::vif(fit), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(v)) break
    # vif() returns named vector or matrix (for factors with >2 levels)
    if (is.matrix(v)) v <- v[, "GVIF"]
    if (all(v < 10)) break
    worst <- names(which.max(v))
    message("  Removing VIF>10: ", worst, " (VIF=", round(max(v), 1), ")")
    preds <- setdiff(preds, worst)
    if (length(preds) == 0) break
    formula <- as.formula(paste(deparse(formula[[2]]), "~", paste(preds, collapse = " + ")))
  }
  formula
}
```

```{r run-all}
# === COLLECT RESULTS ACROSS ALL DISORDER x DIRECTION COMBINATIONS ===
all_results <- list()

for (dis_short in names(disorders)) {
  dis_long <- disorders[[dis_short]]
  sdm_col  <- paste0("SDM_", dis_long)

  # Load mids object from Script 6
  rds_path <- paste0("data_IMP_", dis_short, ".rds")
  if (!file.exists(rds_path)) {
    message("File not found, skipping: ", rds_path)
    next
  }
  mids_obj <- readRDS(rds_path)
  m <- mids_obj$m

  for (direction in directions) {
    label <- paste0(dis_short, "_", direction)
    message("=== ", label, " ===")

    outcome_col <- paste0(direction, "_", dis_long)

    # --- LASSO on each imputed dataset, majority-vote variable selection ---
    all_selected <- list()
    ref_df <- NULL  # keep first dataset for n_cases check

    for (k in 1:m) {
      df_k <- complete(mids_obj, action = k)
      df_model_k <- prepare_df(df_k, sdm_col, outcome_col, direction, candidate_predictors)
      if (k == 1) ref_df <- df_model_k
      sel <- run_lasso(df_model_k, outcome_col, seed = 123 + k)
      all_selected[[k]] <- sel
    }

    n_cases <- sum(ref_df[[outcome_col]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (n_cases < 10) {
      message("  Skipping (only ", n_cases, " cases)")
      next
    }

    # Majority vote: keep variables selected in >= ceil(m/2) imputations
    all_vars <- unlist(all_selected)
    var_counts <- table(all_vars)
    predictor_names <- names(var_counts[var_counts >= ceiling(m / 2)])

    if (length(predictor_names) == 0) {
      message("  No variables selected by majority-vote LASSO")
      next
    }

    message("  Majority-vote LASSO selected: ", paste(predictor_names, collapse = ", "))

    # --- VIF check on first imputed dataset ---
    final_formula <- as.formula(paste(outcome_col, "~", paste(predictor_names, collapse = " + ")))
    final_formula <- vif_check(final_formula, ref_df)
    predictor_names <- attr(terms(final_formula), "term.labels")

    if (length(predictor_names) == 0) {
      message("  No variables remain after VIF check")
      next
    }

    # --- Fit logistic regression on each imputed dataset and pool ---
    fits <- list()
    r2_vals <- numeric(m)

    for (k in 1:m) {
      df_k <- complete(mids_obj, action = k)
      df_model_k <- prepare_df(df_k, sdm_col, outcome_col, direction, candidate_predictors)
      fit_k <- glm(final_formula, data = df_model_k, family = binomial)
      fits[[k]] <- fit_k
      r2_k <- nagelkerke(fit_k)
      r2_vals[k] <- r2_k$Pseudo.R.squared.for.model.vs.null[3]
    }

    # Pool using Rubin's rules via mice::pool()
    pooled <- pool(fits)
    pooled_summary <- summary(pooled, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95)
    r2_val <- mean(r2_vals)

    # --- Tidy output ---
    model_tidy <- pooled_summary %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
      mutate(
        Disorder      = dis_short,
        Direction     = direction,
        N_total       = nrow(ref_df),
        N_cases       = n_cases,
        OR            = round(exp(estimate), 2),
        OR_low        = round(exp(`2.5 %`), 2),
        OR_high       = round(exp(`97.5 %`), 2),
        `OR (95% CI)` = paste0(
          format(OR, nsmall = 2), " (",
          format(OR_low, nsmall = 2), ", ",
          format(OR_high, nsmall = 2), ")"
        ),
        `p-value` = ifelse(p.value < 0.0001, "<0.0001",
                           format(round(p.value, 4), nsmall = 4)),
        `Nagelkerke R2` = format(round(r2_val, 3), nsmall = 3)
      ) %>%
      select(Disorder, Direction, term, `OR (95% CI)`, `p-value`,
             `Nagelkerke R2`, N_total, N_cases)

    all_results[[label]] <- model_tidy
  }
}

# === COMBINE RESULTS ===
results_df <- if (length(all_results) > 0) bind_rows(all_results) else data.frame()

results_df
```
